title: Persistent Death Drops
description: Makes player death drops persistent. For those who don't want to lose items or turn on keepInventory.
body:
This plugin makes players' death items persistent. Prevents getting deleted by time, lava, fire, cactus, explosion.

# Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/X1U8jBDvCkM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Version Support
This plugin should work from 1.8 to latest version of minecraft.

# Feature Request
If you have any feature requests, please let me know by creating a issue on github.
